text: Formal and technical conditions for using calcareous fly ash as an active pozzolanic-hydraulic component in the composition of modern cements and binders were presented in the paper. The studies carried out on hydraulic road binders and masonry cements with calcareous fly ash from Bełchatów Power Plant are provided. The calcareous fly ash was used in different contents in binders as well as in composition of mixtures in which ashes from different sources were used, i.e. siliceous fly ash and fluidized bed combustion fly ash. The main normative properties regulated by the certification and use of the binders and concretes were taken into account in the study. The obtained results confirm suitability of calcareous fly ash from Bełchatów Power Plant for building materials production, enabling obtaining of binders and concretes that meet current construction materials design specifications as well as technical certificates applicable in the construction industry.
explanation: The passage uses polished, generic academic phrasing and a standard abstract-like structure, which AI often produces; while a human author could write similarly, the balance slightly favors AI generation.
